problem id: c2985c8e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  01101110 -> 11011100
  11101011 -> 11010111
  10100110 -> 11001101
  10001111 -> 11011111
  10110110 -> 11101101
  11011010 -> 10110101
  01011100 -> 10111000
  11011000 -> 10110001

query: 11100111
predicted answer: 11001111
